| --- | --- |
| `.velin-auto-text` | `color: light-dark(oklch(15% 0 0), oklch(95% 0 0));` |
| `.velin-auto-text--danger` | `color: color-contrast(var(--velin-color-danger) vs oklch(98% 0 0), oklch(15% 0 0));` |
| `.velin-auto-text--danger` | `color: #fff;` |
